steps.title: Target the team's conclusion
steps.content: The team concluded that certain soil microbes might explain why some tomato plants stayed healthy while others became diseased. Supporting evidence should connect microbial differences to protection from Ralstonia solanacearum.

steps.title: Check what each finding tests
steps.content: B says the disease-causing bacteria were present regardless of plant health. C points to moisture instead of microbes, and D says disease occurred regardless of microbial differences. The answer is A.
